qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Authentication bypass in API clone() due to typo in property key
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding describes a typo bug in Api::clone() that causes authentication bypass on cloned API instances. The advisory describes blueprint injection during page/file/user creation operations that overrides options to bypass creation permissions. These are different root causes: the finding is a property key typo in the clone method, while the advisory is about injection of options configuration during creation operations. The finding does not address the vulnerable code path or root cause described in the advisory.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory describes blueprint injection during page/file/user creation operations in Kirby CMS that allows authenticated users to override options and bypass creation permissions (GHSA-6gqr-mx34-wh8r). The api-clone-auth-bypass finding identifies a real typo bug in Kirby's Api::clone() method that bypasses authentication on cloned API instances, but this is a different vulnerability with a different root cause (typo in property key vs. injection of blueprint options during creation). The finding affects section/field sub-API routes rather than the page/file/user creation operations described in the advisory.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-6gqr-mx34-wh8r describes authorization bypass via blueprint injection during creation operations (pages.create, files.create, users.create permissions)
Advisory root cause: Injected 'options' configuration during page/file/user creation overrides permissions set in user blueprints and model blueprints
Advisory affected versions: Kirby CMS before 4.9.0 and 5.0.0-5.4.0
Finding api-clone-auth-bypass identifies typo 'autentication' in Api::clone() at src/Api/Api.php:216 causing null authentication on cloned API instances
Finding api-clone-auth-bypass affects section/field sub-API routes via sectionApi() and fieldApi(), not page/file/user creation operations
Finding api-clone-auth-bypass has different root cause: typo bug in property key vs. blueprint injection during creation
Advisory vulnerable component: page/file/user creation logic that accepts 'options' in model data
Finding vulnerable component: API clone logic with misspelled property key
